example.value: "Eng ngcadang Bah Ali kijadi ketua," Bah Wan kiurok mase ku sesi penileh ketue kelas enai.

translation.value: "Saya mencadangkan bahawa Bah Ali menjadi ketua," Bah Wan berkata semasa sesi pemilihan ketua kelas mereka.
"I propose that Bah Ali become the class monitor," Bah Wan said at the time of choosing their class monitor.

example.value: "Eng ngpanei kenon sanget eng ajeh kaha-cacoh amen ngneng ya kicadok, ku mase ajehleh ngen ilei nu tandas," Wak Melati kipasal nu ijak.

translation.value: "Saya tahu anak kecil saya itu ingin buang air besar sekiranya saya melihat dia mulai mengcangkung. Pada saat itulah saya membawanya ke tandas," Wak Melati memberitahu ibu mertuanya.
"I know my little boy wants to defecate if I see him start squatting. At that time I take him to the toilet," Wak Melati told her mother-in-law.

example-2.value: Bah Man kibecadok taleh mase ku kateh dewan mase mesyuarat kampug kelemnek, medei kerusi dij ya bigei ya mai.

translation-2.value: Bah Man bercangkung sahaja di dalam dewan semalam, semasa mesyuarat kampung dijalankan semalam kerana semua kerusi telah terdapat orang yang duduk.
Bah Man just squatted down (on the floor) in the hall yesterday during the village meeting because all the seats were occupied.

example.value: Bah Rani kigik cag legos de kialak nu deg ilei medei kisengoh doh cag ajeh jer nu kemil ipelog deg.

definitionorgloss.value: berdoa; meminta kesejahteraan daripada Tuhan, dewa-dewa atau semangat-semangat tertentu mengikut kepercayaan sesuatu suku masyarakat
to pray; to request from the spirits or from the Lord; to wish for something

example.value: Wak Imah mong kibeselai ru arik ajeh kek kicagoh dea kimanik medei kihod iceknet bikeraj ya manik.

translation.value: Wak Imah ada bercucuk-tanam dan pada hari tersebut dia berdoa supaya hujan kerana mahu tanamannya dibasahi hujan.
Wak Imah was farming and on that day she prayed for rain because she wanted her crops to be dampened by the rain.

example.value: Ku mase kibejampi, halak ajeh kicagoh dea gunik kihol ru kiterbor nyaknik sengoi de nyik.

translation.value: Semasa dia berjampi, bomoh tersebut menyeru supaya roh hadir dan menyembuhkan penyakit yang dihadapi oleh pesakitnya.
When he was casting a spell, the shaman summon the spirit to be present and to cure the illness of his patient.

definitionorgloss-2.value: perjampian; doa; serapah; bacaan mentera tertentu dari pawang atau bomoh yang kepada roh-roh, atau semangat dewa-dewa bagi meminta sesuatu dari roh-roh atau dewa-dewa tersebut
incantation; the recitation of certain spells from the shaman to the spirits, or the spirits of the gods to ask for something from those spirits or gods

example-2.value: Cenagoh adeh selalo ha mai belemuk taleh.

translation-2.value: Perjampian selalunya diamalkan oleh bomoh-bomoh sahaja.
Incantations are usually only said by shamans.

Semasa dia berjampi, bomoh tersebut menyeru supaya roh hadir dan menyembuhkan penyakit yang dihadapi oleh pesakitnya.
perjampian; doa; serapah; bacaan mentera tertentu dari pawang atau bomoh yang kepada roh-roh, atau semangat dewa-dewa bagi meminta sesuatu dari roh-roh atau dewa-dewa tersebut
Perjampian selalunya diamalkan oleh bomoh-bomoh sahaja.
en: to pray; to request from the spirits or from the Lord; to wish for something
Wak Imah was farming and on that day she prayed for rain because she wanted her crops to be dampened by the rain.
to summon the spirits
When he was casting a spell, the shaman summon the spirit to be present and to cure the illness of his patient.
incantation; the recitation of certain spells from the shaman to the spirits, or the spirits of the gods to ask for something from those spirits or gods
Incantations are usually only said by shamans.

en: piece
piece

example.value: "Ku mase jisanget entem, mase ajeh pekseg mong letreg. Ku mase ajeh, cahya peliteleh de kiperlau kateh deg. Jibeh kerjak sekulah jiguna pelite taleh. Engkek hunen ya senang, tapi lekat segat belajar," Bah Ngah kiurok nu icecenok.

translation.value: "Sewaktu kami masih kecil, belakan eletrik masih belum ada. Pada masa itu, cuma cahaya pelita yang menerangi rumah. Kami menyiapkan kerja sekolah menggunakan cahaya pelita sahaja. Kamu semua sekarang sudah senang, tetapi masih malas belajar," Bah Ngah berkata kepada cucu-cucunya.

"When we were little, electricity was still not available. At that time, only the light of the oil lamp illuminated the house. We were doing our homework using only the light from the lamp. It is much easier for you (guys) now, but you are still lazy to study," Bah Ngah said to his grandchildren.

definitionorgloss-2.value: bercahaya; memancarkan sinar yang dapat menerangi sesuatu
to shine; to give off light

example-2.value: "Kelem adeh sengur medei gecek pek kibecahya," Bah Kudi kiurok nu Bah Ram.

translation-2.value: "Malam ini gelap-gelita kerana bulan tidak bercahaya," Bah Kudi berkata kepada Bah Ram.
"Tonight is pitch dark because the moon is not shining," Bah Kudi told Bah Ram.

example.value: "Jihnek jik jicak gulei kari pog," kenon Bah Ali kiurok nu ilei.

translation.value: "Tadi kami memakan kari ayam," anak Bah Ali berkata kepadanya.
"Earlier we were eating chicken curry," Bah Ali's son said to him.

definitionorgloss-2.value: to eat; to take an action to chew and swallow food; to be in the middle of eating

example-2.value: Wak Caca kigemar cakcak sej pog de bigureng ya iamek.

translation-2.value: Wak Caca suka memakan ayam yang digoreng oleh ibunya.
Wak Caca likes to eat her mother's fried chicken.

example-2.value: Caknak ku kenduri jekneg kawat eng ihad besendap hicak

translation-2.value: Makanan di kenduri perkahwinan kawan saya sangat sedap dinikmati.
The food at my friend's wedding feast was very tasty.

example-2.value: Ku jis Krismas, canak bijamu ha tengloh de naihol nu madeg.

translation-2.value: Semasa sambutan Hari Krismas, kenduri akan dihidangkan untuk tetamu yang datang ke rumah.
During the Christmas Day celebration, a feast will be served to guests who come to the house.

definitionorgloss-2.value: kenduri; jamuan makan; majlis jamuan makan (perkahwinan, ulangtahun, harijadi dsbnya)

example-2.value: Caknak ku kenduri jekneg kawat eng ihad besendap hicak.

translation-2.value: Pada setiap pagi, Wak Bina pasti membuat nasi goreng sebagai sarapan bagi keluarganya.
Every morning, Wak Bina is sure to make fried rice for breakfast for her family.

definitionorgloss.value: mengumpat; mengatakan sesuatu yang tidak elok tentang orang lain (dengan orang yang lain) tanpa pengetahuannya

example.value: "Jerkek adeh sudah-sudahle becakap ruai mai, entah keknit doh lijerkek balek de kena hal de sama," Bah Amat kiurok nu ikenah ru ikenon menaleh.

translation.value: "Cukup-cukuplah kamu berdua mengumpat mengenai orang lain, mana tahu kemudian nanti kamu berdua sendiri akan terkena hal yang sama," Bah Amat berkata kepada isteri dan anak perempuannya.
"Enough gossiping about others you two, who knows, in the future all the things that you are mentioning could happen to you too," Bah Amat said to his wife and daughter.

example.value: Wak Lila kicalok kupi de ku icawan nu cawan de kilek medei kipanei pek lalu kaha-perdij.

translation.value: Wak Lila menuangkan sebahagian kopi yang ada dicawannya ke cawan yang lain kerana dia mengetahui bahawa dia tidak mampu untuk menghabiskannya.
Wak Lila poured some of the coffee that she had in her cup into another cup because she knew that she could not finish it.

definitionorgloss.value: mencampuri; turut memasuki hal orang lain; bergaul atau menggabungkan diri dengan
to interfere; to enter into the other people's affairs; associate with

example.value: "Eng ya ngget hek agok campeg ha hal mai. Neng hunen, mai biurok hek hapengaroh sengoi ajeh dea kibeh hal de nej," Bah Aren kiles ha ikenah.

translation.value: "Saya sudah melarang kamu mencampuri urusan hidup orang lain. Lihat sekarang, orang-orang sudah menuduh kamu mempengaruhi orang itu melakukan hal yang tidak elok," Bah Aren memarahi isterinya.
"I already prohibited you from interfering in other people's affairs. Look now, they are accusing you of influencing that person to do bad things," Bah Aren said, scolding his wife.

definitionorgloss.value: bulldozer; a machinery to push or move the soil

example.value: "Jap kali naiha-tulak ha keneng sawet, mai kampug jik mesti nainyong cangkok ju tukeh cina," Bah Lali kipasal nu ikekawat.

translation.value: "Setiap kali mahu membersihkan ladang dari pokok kelapa sawit, orang-orang di kampung saya pasti menyewa jentolak milik taukeh cina," Bah Lali memberitahu kepada kawan-kawannya.
"Every time I want to clear the plantation of oil palm trees, the people of my village are sure to rent a bulldozer belonging to a Chinese boss," Bah Lali told his friends.

example.value: "Amek kicip canuk nu pasa malam medei kaha-beli sayo, kisengoh doh dij," Wak Aminah kipasal nu iapak.

translation.value: "Ibu pergi dulu ke pasar malam kerana mahu membeli sayur, dia risau sayur akan habis jika lewat," Wak Aminah memberitahu kepada bapanya.
"Mother went to the night market first because she wanted to buy vegetables, she was worried that the vegetables will sold out if she goes later," Wak Aminah told her father.

"Kalau kamu hendak pergi ke rumah Bah Amin, kamu harus mendaki bukit itu dulu, sebab rumahnya terletak di atas bukit," Wak Nira berkata kepada orang yang bertanya arah ke rumah Bah Amin.
en: to climb
Bah Nan was unable to climb the hill because of his weight.
"If you want to go to Bah Amin's house you must climb the hill first, because his house is on top of the hill," Wak Nira said to the person who asked the direction to Bah Amin's house.

definitionorgloss.value: pencebak; sejenis alat untuk membuat lubang pada tanah, ianya mempunyai bilah yang bermata leper
tool that is like an adze except the blade is in line with the handle, not at right angles to it

example.value: Bah Manan kiguna cebak kaha-beh lubog de kaha-cep cenol cenglei abat.

translation.value: Bah Manan menggunakan pencebak untuk membuat lubang pada tanah bagi tiang penyidai kain.
Bah Manan used a tool like an adze to make holes in the ground for the poles of the clothesline.

definitionorgloss.value: to dig or rake the ground

example.value: Wak Nina kior igensir kicebak tik ha ipasu bunga.

translation.value: Wak Nina menyuruh suaminya menggali tanah untuk mendapatkan tanah bagi diisi pada pasu bunganya.
Wak Nina told her husband to dig the ground to get soil to put into her flower pots.

example-2.value: Bah Jali ru Bah Kana baien pencebak ru cangkol nu tik penep medei ubaiha-sermin penep apak liubai.

translation-2.value: Bah Jali dan Bah Kana membawa pencedok pasir dan cangkul ke tanah perkuburan kerana mahu menyimen kubur bapa mereka.
Bah Jali and Bah Kana brought sand scoops and hoes to the cemetery because they wanted to cement their father's grave.

definitionorgloss.value: keras; ketat; sukar dibuka; sukar dipotong; sukar dipatahkan atau diuraikan
hard; tight; difficult to open; difficult to cut; difficult to break or separated

example.value: Wak Dia kiog butol jem nu igensir medei cegeh pek lalu kibuka.

translation.value: Wak Dia memberikan botol jem kepada suaminya kerana penutupnya keras dan dia tidak mampu membukanya.
Wak Dia gave the jam bottle to her husband because the lid was tight and she was not able to open it.

example.value: Hamapen deg Bah Tang ajeh bibeh ju awat, tapi ilei cegeh ru pek tateh mase pes jear padehjeh. Deg mabek kilek de bibeh ju jehuk bernor buleh kitateh, tapi mahentok jadi ku deg kek.

translation.value: Walaupun rumah Bah Tang diperbuat daripada buluh, tetapi rumahnya tersebut kuat dan tidak runtuh semasa berlaku kejadian ribut tempoh hari. Rumah orang lain yang dibuat daripada kayu yang sempurna telah runtuh, tetapi tiada apa yang terjadi kepada rumahnya.

Although Bah Tang's house is made from bamboo, his house is strong and did not collapse during the storm the other day. Someone else's house made of solid wood collapsed, but nothing happened to his house.

example-2.value: "Deg adeh ya mong sebelom eng ngyos. Lieng hunen ya mong cenok 9 urag, tapi deg adeh lekat tahan. Hamapen ya betahut-tahut kikena pengrag ru manik, ijehuk lekat icenggeh," Bah Ngah kiurok nu itengloh de kitanya ha ideg.

translation-2.value: "Rumah ini sudah ada sebelum saya lahir lagi. Saya sudah mempunyai 9 orang cucu, tetapi rumah ini masih teguh. Walaupun sudah bertahun-tahun ianya terkena panas dan hujan, tetapi kayu dan papan pada rumah ini masih sangat keras," Bah Ngah berkata kepada tetamunya yang bertanya mengenai rumahnya.

"This house existed before I was born. Now I have 9 grandchildren but this house is still strong. Although it has been exposed to the sun and rain for years, the wood  is still very hard," Bah Ngah told his guests who asked about his house.

example-2.value: Wak Maria kiog butol sos nu igensir medei ihad icenggeh, pek lalu kibuka.

translation-2.value: Wak Maria memberikan botol sos kepada suaminya kerana sangat susah untuk dibuka dan dia tidak mampu membukanya.
Wak Maria gave a bottle of sauce to her husband because it was very difficult to open and she unable to open it.

"Rumah ini sudah ada sebelum saya lahir lagi. Saya sudah mempunyai 9 orang cucu, tetapi rumah ini masih teguh. Walaupun sudah bertahun-tahun ianya terkena panas dan hujan, tetapi kayu dan papan pada rumah ini masih sangat keras," Bah Ngah berkata kepada tetamunya yang bertanya mengenai rumahnya.
Wak Maria memberikan botol sos kepada suaminya kerana sangat susah untuk dibuka dan dia tidak mampu membukanya.
en: hard; tight; difficult to open; difficult to cut; difficult to break or separated
Wak Dia gave the jam bottle to her husband because the lid was tight and she was not able to open it.
stout; strong

Although Bah Tang's house is made from bamboo, his house is strong and did not collapse during the storm the other day. Someone else's house made of solid wood collapsed, but nothing happened to his house.
very hard; very durable

"This house existed before I was born. Now I have 9 grandchildren but this house is still strong. Although it has been exposed to the sun and rain for years, the wood  is still very hard," Bah Ngah told his guests who asked about his house.
very hard to open
Wak Maria gave a bottle of sauce to her husband because it was very difficult to open and she unable to open it.
Paling

definitionorgloss.value: to stand with one's hands on (one's waist)

example.value: "Neng Bah Sulah ajeh, kicekek iwog begei bos ru langsong pek kitulog kerjak de tengah bibeh," Bah Man kiurok nu Bah Rani.

translation.value: "Lihat Bah Sulah tersebut, dia mencekak pinggangnya dan lagaknya itu seperti seorang bos. Dia langsung tidak membantu orang-orang yang sedang melalukan kerja tersebut," Bah man berkata kepada Bah Rani.
"Look at Bah Sulah, with his hands on his waist - he is behaving like a boss. He is not helping the people who are working," Bah man said to Bah Rani.

example.value: Bah Selan kisiwa cengkor tukeh cina kicekor itapak deg.

translation.value: Bah Selan menyewa jentolak milik taukeh cina bagi meratakan tanah untuk tapak rumahnya.
Bah Selan rented a bulldozer belonging to a Chinese boss to level the site for his new house.

definitionorgloss-2.value: pengorek; jentera berat atau alatan ringan yang digunakan untuk mengorek, meratakan dan menolak tanah

example-2.value: Wak Mia kipet ikenon sanget medei ikenon ajeh kiguna sudu sebegei cengkor, kicekor tik ku laman deg enai.

definitionorgloss.value: turun; bergerak dari tempat yang tinggi ke tempat yang rendah; beralih dari atas ke bawah

example.value: Kenon cok ajeh kisengoh kaha-celeh ju rangkal.

translation.value: Anak anjing tersebut takut untuk turun dari tangga.

example-2.value: Cengleh nu mateu ajeh ihad selej.

to bring down; to cause someone to go down

example-2.value: Bah Iwat kikerjak cerleh kotak sayo ju luri mase tengah kipoj ikputusan SPM.

translation-2.value: Bah Iwat bekerja sebagai buruh yang menurunkan kotak-kotak sayur dari lori semasa berada dalam tempoh menunggu keputusan perperiksaan SPM.

example.value: Wak Sisah kicelog ha kikedei liloi ku teu.

translation.value: Wak Sisah lemas kerana tidak pandai berenang.
Wak Sisah drowned because she did not know how to swim.

definitionorgloss-2.value: memasukan sesuatu ke dalam cecair seperti air, kuah, dsb.
to put something into a liquid such as water, gravy, etc.

example-2.value: Bah Kudi kicerlog bubu ku kateh teu Pelawat sebelom kiet tengroj.

translation-2.value: Bah Kudi memasukkan bubu ke dalam sungai Palawan sebelum pergi memancing.

example-2.value: Wak Shima kicerlog nij empoj nu menasak ikenon menaleh medei kirasa lekat beloj.

definitionorgloss.value: muncul secara tiba-tiba; datang secara tiba-tiba; kedatangan yang tidak disangka-sangka

example.value: Kerite de kicelun ju kenog Wak Mina ru Wak Lala mase ubai tengah ubai poj lampu isarat ku simpang ajeh nek, kibeh ubai de ku kemil mutu ajeh ubai kekjet.

translation.value: Kereta yang muncul dengan secara tiba-tiba dari arah belakang Wak Mina dan Wak Lala semasa mereka berdua sedang menunggu lampu isyarat di simpang tadi membuatkan mereka berdua yang ada di atas motosikal tersebut menjadi terkejut.

The car that appeared suddenly from behind Wak Mina and Wak Lala while they were waiting for the traffic lights at the intersection, startled the two of them that were on the motorcycle. Screen reader support enabled.

sound; a continuous voice from animals or humans; the non-stop conversation of someone speaking

example.value: Bah Pani kihalei taleh de belwal tapi higertek cemerbej.

translation.value: Hanya Bah Pani seorang sahaja yang bercakap tetapi kedengaran bahawa dia tak henti-henti bercakap.
Only Bah Pani was spoke but it sounded like he never stopped talking.

example.value: "Gerteg engrok cep ajeh cemerbej, tah ma de naimur?" Bah Jol kiurok nu ikenon.

translation.value: "Dengar, burung-burung tersebut tidak berhenti-henti berbunyi, agaknya entah apa yang mereka begitu?" Bah Jol berkata kepada anaknya.
"Listen, the birds are constantly chirping, I wonder what makes them them do that?" Bah Jol said to his son.

example.value: Ajok Bah Salman ya cenak ipenghod, jadi dij ikenon-cenok naijog naiha-neng ha ilei.

translation.value: Nenek Bah Salman sudah sakit tenat, jadi semua anak-anak dan cucu-cucunya pulang bagi melihat beliau.
Bah Salman's grandmother was on her death bed, so all her children and grandchildren went home to see her.

example.value: "Bah Suren ihad cenak telas kieksiden mutu mase kijog ju ikerjak. Hunen ilei lekat ku hospitel, kikoma," Bah Mali kipasal nu ikekawat.

translation.value: "Bah Suren mengalami kecederaan yang teruk selepas mengalami kemalangan motosikal semasa pulang dari tempat kerjanya. Sekarang dia masih berada di hospital dan dalam keadaan koma," Bah Mali memberitahu rakan-rakannya.
"Bah Suren suffered severe injuries after having a motorcycle accident on his way home from work. Now he is still in the hospital and in a coma," Bah Mali told his friends.

Hunen ilei lekat ku hospitel, kikoma," Bah Mali kipasal nu ikekawat."Bah Suren mengalami kecederaan yang teruk selepas mengalami kemalangan motosikal semasa pulang dari tempat kerjanya. Sekarang dia masih berada di hospital dan dalam keadaan koma," Bah Mali memberitahu rakan-rakannya. "Bah Suren suffered severe injuries after having a motorcycle accident on his way home from work. Now he is still in the hospital and in a coma," Bah Mali told his friends.

definitionorgloss.value: simpang; sesuatu yang bercabang atau melencong dari yang lurus (jalan raya, sungai)

example.value: "Nong ku kampug eng mong jeoi icentag nu deg-deg mai. Jadi, bile ya halei ku miknuj kampug jik, hatalipon eng ru eng doh ngnyong hek. Amen tok, doh senang harikroj," Bah Lan kipasal nu Bah Aril.

translation.value: "Terdapat banyak simpang pada jalan di kampung untuk ke rumah-rumah para penduduk. Jadi, apabila kamu sudah sampai ke jalan masuk utama ke kampung saya, kamu hubungi saya supaya saya boleh menjemput kamu. Jika tidak, kamu akan mudah tersesat," Bah Lan memberitahu kepada Bah Aril.

"There are many junctions on the road in my village, to access the villagers' houses. So, when you have reached the main entrance to my village, call me so I can pick you up. Otherwise, you will easily get lost," Bah Lan told Bah Aril.

definitionorgloss.value: centong; alat muzik tradisi dibuat daripada buluh yang digunakan semasa upacara sewang
centong; traditional musical instrument made from bamboo, used in the sewang ceremony

example.value: Centeg adeh selalo bibeh ju awat. Tapi hunen, ya mong mai de naiguna batag paep PVC medei lebeh tahan liu.

translation.value: Centong selalunya diperbuat dari buluh. Tetapi sekarang sudah terdapat orang yang menggunakan batang paip PVC kerana ianya lebih tahan lama berbanding buluh.
The Centong is usually made of bamboo. However, nowadays there are people who use PVC pipes because they are more durable than bamboo.

definitionorgloss.value: memanggil; memanggil sesorang dengan suara kedengaran
to call out; to call someone with a clear voice

example.value: Wak Sisah ajeh pekak isengoi, amen hicereg walah pek kicerengai.

translation.value: Wak Sisah itu pekak orangnya, jika kita panggil dia tidak mendengar.
Wak Sisah is a deaf person, she cannot hear if we call her.

example-2.value: "Wak Sarah, hek bicereg ya amek. Kior jog nu madeg," engrok Wak Rita nu imenang.

translation-2.value: "Wak Sarah, kamu dipanggil ibu. Dia disuruh kamu pulang ke rumah," kata Wak Rita kepada adiknya.
"Wak Sarah, mother called you. She asked you to come home," Wak Rita said to her sister.

definitionorgloss-2.value: dipanggil; diberi gelaran; disebut dengan nama julukan
to be called by a name or a title

example-2.value: Suhaidi imat rilan. Sebab ajeh ilei bicereg Bah Rilan ya iperingak.

translation-2.value: Suhaidi memiliki mata yang besar. Itulah sebabnya dia dipanggil dengan nama Bah Rilan oleh keluarganya.
Suhaidi has big eyes. That is why he is called by the name, Bah Rilan by his family members.

definitionorgloss-2.value: nama panggilan; nama yang yang gelar

example-2.value: Kenon cok ajeh biog imuh cengreg sebegei Bah Luc.

translation-2.value: Anak anjing tersebut diberi nama panggilan sebagai Bah Luc.
The puppy was given the nickname Bah Luc.

example.value: Bah Chong kigik tarek jeer ku ibeng deg medei ya cereg, kisengoh doh kikol nu imadeg.

translation.value: Bah Chong menebang pokok kelapa yang terdapat di sebelah rumahnya kerana ianya sudah tinggi, dia risau ianya akan menimpa rumahya.
Bah Chong cut down the coconut tree next to his house because it was already too tall, he was worried it would hit his house.

example-2.value: Bah Ani ajeh ihad cereg, ilei icengreg kaha-merek 2 mite.

translation-2.value: Bah Ani seorang yang tinggi, ketinggiannya hampir 2 meter.
Bah Ani is a tall man, almost 2 meters in height.

example-2.value: Relai de bicap ku deg pog ajeh ihad cereg, icengreg kaha-merek 3 mite.

translation-2.value: Ular sawa yang ditangkap di reban ayam tersebut sangat panjang, panjangnya hampir 3 meter.
The python caught in the chicken coop was very long, almost 3 meters long.

definitionorgloss.value: mencari; berusaha supaya dapat atau dijumpai

example.value: Bah Sani kiceryak idabal de yog ku semak.

translation.value: Bah Sani mencari dompetnya yang telah jatuh di semak.
Bah Sani looked for his wallet that had fallen in the bushes.

example.value: Sejak ju pai kilei leileh nu waktu rihat ha caknak tengah arik, Bah Selah kiceryak ha ipekerja-pekerja naibeh kerjak medei kaha-penei ilei belok de selalo kicak gaji buta.

translation.value: Mulai dari saat beliau sampai sehingga ke waktu rehat bagi makan tengah hari, Bah Selah memerhati para pekerja melakukan pekerjaan masing-masing kerna ingin mengetahui yang mana satu yang sering mencuri tulang.

example.value: Bah Kudi kicet keneng legos ku ienglag deg.

translation.value: Bah Kudi menanam pohon rambutan di sebelah rumahnya.
Bah Kudi planted a rambutan tree at the side of his house.

example-2.value: "Amek kijoi ajok nu selai, ubai ha cekcet lada," kenon litau Bah Aman kiberlag bile bitanya ya iapaq.

translation-2.value: "Ibu mengikuti nenek ke kebun, mereka mahu menanam lada," anak lelaki Bah Aman menjawab apabila ditanya oleh bapanya.
"Mother went with grandmother to the farm, they wanted to plant peppers," Bah Aman's son replied when asked by his father.

example-2.value: Ceknet Wak Melati de ku iselai ajeh dij bicak ya gau.

translation-2.value: Tanaman yang ditanam oleh Wak Melati di kebunnya habis dimakan oleh babi.
All of the crops that were planted by Wak Melati in her garden were eaten by the pigs.

definitionorgloss.value: berjalan; bergerak ke depan, belakang, kiri atau kanan untuk ke sesuatu tempat
to walk; to move foward, backward, left or right to reach a certain place

example.value: Mase kicip nu mateu, Bah Guli kiyog ru dij kutor iseluar.

translation.value: Dalam perjalanan ke sungai, Bah Guli terjatuh dan seluarnya menjadi kotor.
On the way to the river, Bah Guli fell and his trousers became dirty.

example-2.value: Wak Yani ru ikekawat naigemar cekcip nu pasa malam.

translation-2.value: Wak Yani dan kawan-kawannya suka berjalan-jalan ke pasar malam.
Wak Yani and her friends like to go window shopping at the night market.

example-2.value: Wak Mira lekat buleh kibayang lei hunen ha kemalangan kerite ru lori de kibakek mase ku kateh iceknip nu Cameron Highlands.

translation-2.value: Sehingga sekarang, Wak Mira masih boleh membayangkan kejadian kemalangan antara kereta dan lori yang beliau saksikan semasa di dalam perjalanannya ke Cameron Highland.
Until now, Wak Mira can still recall in her mind the accident between a car and a truck that she witnessed on her trip to Cameron Highlands.

definitionorgloss-2.value: berpergian, berjalan ke tempat yang jauh

example.value: Bah Tam kiles ha ikenon sanget medei kicoh ku kateh iseluar, pek kipasal kaha-cacoh.

translation.value: Bah Tam memarahi anak kecilnya kerana membuang air besar di dalam seluarnya dan tidak memberitahu kepadanya yang dia mahu membuang air besar.
Bah Tam scolded his little boy for defecating in his trousers and because he did not tell him that he wanted to go to the toilet.

example-2.value: Wak Rima kiberyol imemang dea kiperop kek cacoh nu tandas ku luar deg medei iarik ya kelem.

translation-2.value: Wak Rima mengejutkan adiknya dari tidur supaya menemaninya pergi membuang air besar pada tandas yang terletak di luar rumah kerana waktu sudah malam.
Wak Rima woke her younger sister from sleep to accompany her to defecate on the toilet which was located outside the house, because it was already night.

example-2.value: "Mila, kenon hek kicakcoh," Wak Lila kipasal nu Wak Mila.

translation-2.value: "Mila, anak kamu sedang berak," Wak Lila memberitahu kepada Wak Mila.
"Mila, your child is defecating," Wak Lila told Wak Mila.

example-2.value: Ku ceknet hubik Wak Ina mong caknoh cok.

translation-2.value: Terdapat najis anjing di tempat Wak Ina menanam ubi kayu.
There are dog faeces at the place where Wak Ina is planting cassava.

example-2.value: "Eng ngnyek dakdek kuceg ku padeg, medei icanoh ratah!," Wak Amah kiberlag ha sengmanj ikenon de kaha-bela kuceg ku deg enai.

translation-2.value: "Saya tidak mahu membela kucing di rumah kerana ianya berak di merata-rata tempat!" Wak Amah menjawab permintaan anaknya yang mahu membela kucing di rumah mereka.
"I don't want to keep a cats in our home because they will defecate all over the place!" Wak Amah was responding to the request of her son who wanted to raise a cat in their house.

definitionorgloss.value: mengebumikan mayat; menanam mayat orang yang sudah mati (meninggal dunia)

example.value: Wak Anum kicop kenun kucig ku englag deg.

translation.value: Wak Anum mengebumikan anak kucing di sebelah rumahnya.
Wak Anum buried the kitten at the side of her house.

example-2.value: "Cennom ajok eng bibeh pegelap huper, telaaas rimdij ikekenon-cenok nailei. Amen engkeha-sueg, holle sebelom ajeh," Wak Salwa kipasal nu ikekawat kampug.

translation-2.value: "Pengkebumian nenek saya akan dijalankan pada pagi esok, setelah semua anak-anak dan cucu-cucunya sampai ke kampung. Jika kalian hendak menziarahi, datanglah sebelum masa tersebut," Wak Salwa memberitahu kawan-kawan sekampungnya.

"My grandmother's burial will take place tomorrow morning, after all her children and grandchildren have reached the village. If you want to visit, come before that time," Wak Salwa told her friends in the village.

example.value: Hamapen kirasa cuag, Bah Man kiterhan taleh medei pek cukop iduet kaha-beli caknak.

Even though he felt hungry, Bah Man just endured it because he did not have enough money to buy food.

translation-2.value: Anak-anak ayam di dalam reban berbunyi dengan riuh sekali kerana kelaparan akibat ditinggalkan oleh ibu mereka.
